title: OpenAI shutters AI video generator Sora in abrupt announcement
summary: Tech firm ‘says goodbye’ to Sora, made publicly available in 2024, just six months after its launch of a stand-alone appIn an abrupt announcement on Tuesday, OpenAI said it was “saying goodbye” to its AI video generator Sora.
